mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, report_key, name, filter_json, is_default, is_subscribed, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM analytics_user_view WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, report_key, name, filter_json, is_default, is_subscribed, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM analytics_user_view WHERE report_key = #{reportKey} AND is_subscribed = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analytics_user_view (user_id, report_key, name, filter_json, is_default, is_subscribed, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reportKey}, #{name}, #{filterJson}, #{isDefault}, #{isSubscribed}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE analytics_user_view SET name = #{name}, filter_json = #{filterJson}, is_default = #{isDefault}, is_subscribed = #{isSubscribed}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM analytics_user_view WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
